title: BDRY - September 12, 2023
summary: Will the third time be the charm? Spot rates continue to creep higher - Despite the strong iron ore export volumes China continues to provide targeted support to its ailing economy; might the worst be behind us? - As most of Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
